[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000001000 1
4 110111111 8
5 010111010 5
6 101000010 3
7 000111010 4

01 10 110111111 8 match 4
12 21 110111111 8 match 4
23 32 111111010 7
34 43 101111010 6
45 54 101111011 7
56 65 111011011 7
67 76 111110111 8
70 07 101101110 6

02 20 010111010 5 match 5
13 31 111111111 a
24 42 010111010 5 match 5
35 53 101011011 6
46 64 010111011 6
57 75 101111111 8
60 06 010011001 4
71 17 111111111 a

03 30 101001010 4
14 41 110111111 8 match 4
25 52 111111011 8
36 63 111010011 6
47 74 101111110 7
50 05 101011011 6
61 16 110111111 8 match 4
72 27 111111110 8

04 40 000111010 4 match 7
15 51 111111111 a
26 62 010111011 6
37 73 101100110 5
